# style

**Instance Property**

The appearance to use when displaying items in the top shelf interface.

## Declaration

```swift
var style: TVTopShelfCarouselContent.Style { get }
```

## Getting the Item Style

- **TVTopShelfCarouselContent.Style**: Constants indicating how you want items to appear in the top shelf interface.
